## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Strapi content workflow, quality standards, and team dynamics with Usman Ghani.](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strapi content production is \~10 articles/week, with a streamlined workflow in Atlas and minimal edits required](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Code fact-checking is automated, but occasional outdated code issues arise due to LLM limitations](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Strapi team (esp. Victor) is happy with SEO results; they're creative and enjoy brainstorming sessions](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Content quality standards for Strapi are not as demanding as previous high-end clients (e.g., Animals)](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Workflow

  - [Sydney creates article briefs in Notion with S2 information](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Usman generates articles in Atlas grid using provided information](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Editing and uploading checklists guide the process](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [15-20 hours/week dedicated to article writing and revisions](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Status updates communicated through Airtable and Slack](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Atlas project for Strapi now fixed, working smoothly](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [No image generation in current workflow (external agency previously involved)](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Automated code fact-checker (Kappa AI) implemented, but occasional outdated code issues persist](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Specific template used for Strapi integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)

### Team Dynamics and Communication

  - [Victor (high-level) and two hands-on team members (incl. Theo) involved in content review](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Minimal direct editing; feedback mainly on code issues, formatting, and meta descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Team is creative, enjoys brainstorming sessions, and is open to new ideas (e.g., Medium integration)](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)

### Quality Standards

  - [Strapi's content quality requirements are not as stringent as previous high-end clients (e.g., Animals)](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Few edits typically needed, indicating satisfaction with current output](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Usman to create and share a Loom video detailing the publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Usman to add relevant documents (checklists, templates, etc.) to Slack channel bookmarks](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Vivek and Timmy to review shared documents and SOPs](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Team to prepare for potential brainstorming sessions and integration discussions with Strapi](https://fathom.video/share/sfzvydj7CiseSRfKnZ8c69e2uykFUNYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
